calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-26-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Brenda Fields
Petitioner, present with counsel, Albert L. Boasberg, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Maria Coffino.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-02-2003 Reset To Aug-21-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as regularly scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Herbert Donaldson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Albert Loeb Boasbert, Esq. for petitioner Brindusa Pitulea-not present, cousel requesting continuance to August 21, 2003 at 9:00 AM.
The Court grants the request in open court.
